variants: Dymtro Hlushko currently resides in Rockwren Courtyard and works at Iris Chain Logistics, where his expertise in logistics has significantly enhanced the company's operations. He grew up in Skydrop Township and pursued his higher education at Azure Peak College, where he developed essential skills in his field. Dymtro's dedication to excellence did not go unnoticed, as he was honored with the Sanctum Crescent Citation for his remarkable contributions.
